title: Migration To TOHO
content: Since the discontinuation of TOR-W: L, I have moved back to the modding in host-only mods.
Please note, no mod releases will be posted here in news, due to the Changelogs block already existing and it also being on the official GitHub repository.
Ever since moving back, I have talked to the mod's creator, Lime (limeau on Discord), that I can revamp this website for his mod.

With that said, I am glad to be back in the host-only modding community, and I feel welcomed more than ever, and I hope that you all will enjoy the mod as much as I do spending time coding awesome roles and modifiers t play with.
author: The Head Of Development, Andries & Lime

title: Website Update
content:
Some new things have been added to website, ever since the release, and yes, in the same day it was released (for me, I know timezones exist).
There has been two new ages added:
- Feedback
- Birsthdays
The Feedback page is there to directly send bugs, suggestions or just feedback about the website. THIS DOES REQUIRE A DISCORD LOGIN TO NOT HAVE TROLL LOGS.
The Birthdays page is limited, as it is just gonna be used for birthdays for members in the server, most likely just staff. This is to publicly wish people a happy birthday so that it encourages more members to send wishes and regard on the website. This also requires a Discord login, sadly.
Like I said, it stops from people messing with the stuff and sending troll messages.
author: The Head Of Development, Andries
